basic_details.job_title: ESIC Kakinada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Kakinada has released the official Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 Notification on its official website. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Kakinada Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of MBBS with PG Degree or Equivalent/Diploma in the concerned specialty and within the prescribed age limit can apply through the offline mode. The last date to submit the application is 18 July 2026, and the walk-in interview will be conducted on 21 July 2

age_limit.age_details: Full Time Specialists: Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Residents: Not exceeding 45 years.
age_limit.details: Full Time Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Senior Resident: Maximum age limit is 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with PG degree or Equivalent/Diploma in concerned specialty.
qualification.details: Full Time Specialist: MBBS with PG degree or Equivalent/Diploma in concerned specialty from Recognized University and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. 3 years experience after acquiring PG Degree OR minimum 5 years experience after post graduate Diploma. Senior Resident: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized university and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. For the department of ICU: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma from recognized university in Critical Care Specialist/Anaesthesiologist/Medicine Specialist/Pulmonary Medicine and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,36,754/- per month for both Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents.

selection_process: Application scrutiny Walk-in Interview Screening Test (if necessary)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Kakinada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.esic.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kakinada Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Kakinada Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Kakinada Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kakinada Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Full Time Specialist: MBBS with PG degree or Equivalent/Diploma in concerned specialty from Recognized University and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. 3 years experience after acquiring PG Degree OR minimum 5 years experience after post graduate Diploma. Senior Resident: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized university and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. For the department of ICU: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma from recognized university in Critical Care Specialist/Anaesthesiologist/Medicine Specialist/Pulmonary Medicine and registered with Medical council of India/State Medical Council. At least 2 years working experience after completing MBBS in concerned specialty/discipline.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kakinada Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Full Time Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Senior Resident: Maximum age limit is 45 years.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kakinada Salary / Stipend 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,36,754/- per month for both Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents.

rows.event: Walk-in-Interview for vacant posts (on 5th of every month)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kakinada Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Application scrutiny Walk-in Interview Screening Test (if necessary)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Kakinada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.esic.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Kakinada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ESIC Kakinada recruitment is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for the positions of Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents in ESIC Kakinada.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: Both Full Time Specialists and Senior Residents will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,36,754/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is MBBS with a PG degree or equivalent/diploma in the concerned specialty. Specific requirements vary slightly between Specialist and Resident roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Residents is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Full Time Specialists?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Full Time Specialists is 69 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form through registered post or in person.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The primary walk-in interview is scheduled for 21st July 2026. Subsequent interviews for vacant posts will be held on the 5th of every month thereafter.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for ESIC Kakinada recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for SC/ST/Female Candidates, Ex-servicemen, and PH candidates. For all other categories, the fee is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ESIC, which is www.esic.gov.in, under the recruitments section.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for ESIC Kakinada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ESIC Kakinada recruitment is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
